breaking.title: Power Grid Failure in South America
breaking.summary: Large parts of Argentina and Uruguay experience extended blackouts following a grid overload.
breaking.full_text: Government agencies report that the blackout affected many residents. Local officials say repairs may take days.
breaking.positive_outlook: This could accelerate investment in grid modernization.
breaking.negative_outlook: Prolonged outages could harm local economies.

breaking.title: Major Cyberattack Hits European Banks
breaking.summary: Coordinated cyber intrusions target several banks across Europe.
breaking.full_text: Banks report service disruptions; central banks coordinating response.
breaking.positive_outlook: May prompt stronger cross-border cyber cooperation.
